inputs.code:
import subprocess
import os

# Find ComfyUI path
comfy_path = None
for p in ['/workspace/ComfyUI', '/root/ComfyUI', '/home/*/ComfyUI', '/opt/ComfyUI']:
    import glob
    matches = glob.glob(p)
    for m in matches:
        if os.path.exists(m):
            comfy_path = m
            break
    if comfy_path:
        break

if not comfy_path:
    comfy_path = '/workspace/ComfyUI'  # Default

models_dir = f'{comfy_path}/models/diffusion_models'
loras_dir = f'{comfy_path}/models/loras'
os.makedirs(models_dir, exist_ok=True)
os.makedirs(loras_dir, exist_ok=True)

# Download WAN 2.2 I2V models
wan_models = [
    ('https://huggingface.co/Kijai/Wan2.2_comfy/resolve/main/Wan2_2-I2V-14B-480P_fp8_e4m3fn_KJ.safetensors', 'Wan2_2-I2V-14B-480P_fp8.safetensors'),
    ('https://huggingface.co/Kijai/Wan2.2_comfy/resolve/main/Wan2_2-I2V-14B-720P_fp8_e4m3fn_KJ.safetensors', 'Wan2_2-I2V-14B-720P_fp8.safetensors'),
]

# Download NSFW LoRAs from CivitAI
nsfw_loras = [
    ('https://civitai.com/api/download/models/1350089?token=7f2616b70a2963e6aabbce8955b4df08', 'wan2_nsfw_sex_v1.safetensors'),
    ('https://civitai.com/api/download/models/1380139?token=7f2616b70a2963e6aabbce8955b4df08', 'blowjob_wan_v1.safetensors'),
    ('https://civitai.com/api/download/models/1374925?token=7f2616b70a2963e6aabbce8955b4df08', 'wan_nude_v1.safetensors'),
]

# Start downloads
for url, filename in wan_models:
    cmd = f'cd {models_dir} && nohup wget -q -c -O {filename} "{url}" > /tmp/dl_{filename}.log 2>&1 &'
    subprocess.Popen(['bash', '-c', cmd], start_new_session=True)

for url, filename in nsfw_loras:
    cmd = f'cd {loras_dir} && nohup wget -q -c -O {filename} "{url}" > /tmp/dl_{filename}.log 2>&1 &'
    subprocess.Popen(['bash', '-c', cmd], start_new_session=True)

str_out = f'Downloads started in {comfy_path}'
